mlx.data.features.FrequencyScale

class mlx.data.features.FrequencyScale(value)

Enum to choose the frequency scaling for the filter banks.

__init__()

Attributes

MEL

The commonly used Mel scale.

LOG10

Logarithmic scale.

LINEAR

No scaling.
